title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
